entries.notes: Searched for CSRF token validation, anti-forgery middleware, and request verification. No implementation found in codebase. This is a NinjaTrader strategy, not a web application, so CSRF protection is not applicable.

Searched for rate limiter, throttle, request limit patterns. No explicit rate limiting implementation found. Order management uses FSM/Actor pattern for sequential processing, which provides implicit rate control through queue-based execution.
